summary: Recent updates to the Canvas testing infrastructure in Firefox have introduced several important enhancements. One key change is the **split of the generated WebGL mochitest manifest into per-cluster files**, which makes it easier for developers to manage and run tests more effectively, improving the overall testing process. Additionally, the error messages for `createImageBitmap`, a function that helps convert images into usable formats for canvas drawing, have been improved to provide clearer information when something goes wrong. Furthermore, support has been added for the updated Azure A10 WebGL renderer string, ensuring better compatibility and performance for users on systems utilizing this graphics processing technology. These changes collectively aim to enhance the reliability and clarity of the Canvas features in Firefox.
